page.connectionDescription: Connect your Outlook account to CRM and manage calendar and mail integration.
page.syncDescription: Monitor sync scope and permissions from this screen.
page.logsDescription: Outlook integration logs are listed on this page.
page.authInformationDescription: Follow Outlook OAuth setup and required permission steps from this page.

connection.connectedError: Outlook connection could not be completed.
connection.connectError: Outlook authorize URL could not be fetched.
connection.disconnectError: Outlook connection could not be removed.
connection.oauthNotConfiguredWarning: Outlook OAuth is not configured. Your admin must complete steps on 'Informazioni autenticazione Outlook'.

authInformation.currentStatusDescription: This page shows required setup details for Outlook OAuth.
authInformation.currentStatusHint: Tenant-level Outlook OAuth settings endpoint is not enabled in API yet, so this page is guide-only for now.
authInformation.setupGuideDescription: Crea an application registration in Microsoft Entra Admin Center, then configure callback and permissions.
authInformation.setupStep1: Apri Microsoft Entra Admin Center and select the correct tenant.
authInformation.setupStep2: Crea a web app registration from App registrations > Nuovo registration.
authInformation.setupStep3: In Authentication, Aggiungi the callback URL below as Redirect URI (Web).
authInformation.setupStep4: In API permissions, Aggiungi Calendar and Mail permissions and grant admin consent.
authInformation.setupStep5: Once backend enables Outlook OAuth tenant settings endpoint, Salva Client ID/Secret in the related screen.
authInformation.permissionHint: Calendar.ReadWrite for calendar and Mail.Invia for email are the minimum suggested scopes.

sync.flowMeeting: Meeting activities are synchronized to Outlook Calendar.
sync.flowCall: Call activities are synchronized to Outlook Calendar.
sync.flowPlaceholder: Detailed sync settings will be available in the next release.

logs.detailsDescription: Detailed information about the selected Outlook integration log entry.

mailDialog.title: Outlook E-postası Gönder
mailDialog.missingCustomer: Bu kayıtla ilişkili müşteri bulunamadı. E-posta gönderilebilmesi için müşteri zorunludur.
mailDialog.autoRecipientHint: Boş bırakılırsa kişi veya müşteri e-postası otomatik olarak kullanılır

generic.subject: {{module}} #{{id}} hakkında bilgilendirme
generic.body:
Merhaba,

{{customer}} müşterisine ait {{module}} #{{id}} kaydı hakkında bilgi paylaşmak istiyorum.

İyi çalışmalar.

followUp.subject: {{module}} #{{id}} takip bilgisi
followUp.body:
Merhaba,

{{customer}} / {{contact}} için {{module}} #{{id}} kaydının takibi kapsamında sizinle iletişime geçiyoruz.

Uygun olduğunuzda geri dönüş yapabilir misiniz?

reminder.subject: {{module}} #{{id}} hatırlatma
reminder.body:
Merhaba,

{{customer}} müşterisine ait {{module}} #{{id}} kaydı için hatırlatma iletisi.

Teşekkürler.

mailDialog.invalidRecipients: Invalid email addresses must be fixed before sending.

policies.validation: Sending is blocked if any address is invalid.
policies.activity: A CRM activity is created after a successful send.
policies.logging: A send log is stored in the system.

mailDialog.pdfCardDescription: Choose a template for this document type. The generated PDF is added directly as an attachment.
mailDialog.pdfTemplateRequired: Please select a PDF template first.
mailDialog.pdfAttached: PDF generated and added to attachments.
mailDialog.pdfTemplatesLoadFailed: PDF templates could not be loaded.
mailDialog.noPdfTemplates: No active PDF template found for this document type.
mailDialog.previewHint: Check the final version before sending.
mailDialog.footerHint: Invalid recipients are blocked before sending and successful sends are logged as CRM activity.
mailDialog.activityLogEnabled: A CRM activity and log are automatically created after successful sending.
